title: Sliema, Sliema District — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Sliema, Sliema District: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Sliema is a city in Sliema District with a population of 22,000. Malta’s most cosmopolitan town, a bustling waterfront hub with a vibrant promenade, shopping district, and stunning views across Marsamxett Harbour to Valletta.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
